name: A Gold 2 Cash Exchange
description_short: Family-owned precious metals buyer in Orlando specializing in gold, silver, and platinum jewelry. Offers instant cash payments with state-certified scales and no hidden refining fees.
description_long:
A Gold 2 Cash Exchange is a family-owned precious metals buyer located in Orlando, Florida at 697 North Semoran Boulevard. The business operates as a direct gold and silver dealer, positioning itself as an alternative to traditional jewelry stores and pawn shops by eliminating middleman markups and reducing overhead costs.

The company buys a wide range of precious metals and jewelry items, including gold jewelry of all conditions, gold coins, silver coins, gold bars, silver tea sets, and scrap gold, silver, and platinum. They explicitly do not purchase gold-plated or gold-filled items, only solid precious metals. All items are weighed and tested on state-certified scales in front of customers with no appointment necessary, and the company advertises "no minimum weight requirements" and no hidden refining fees.

A Gold 2 Cash Exchange distinguishes itself through BBB membership, state of Florida licensing and insurance, transparent pricing practices, and a stated commitment to paying more than competitors. The company emphasizes keeping overhead costs minimal to offer higher payouts, avoiding expensive mass media advertising that competitors' customers ultimately subsidize. Staff is described as knowledgeable and friendly, and the business operates Monday-Saturday with extended hours.

While the company presents itself professionally with transparent practices and no appointment requirements, potential sellers should note that precious metals buying is inherently subjective based on current market prices and individual purity testing. The company's claim to pay "more" than competitors is unverifiable without market comparison. Additionally, like all precious metals buyers, they profit on the spread between buying and selling prices to refiners.
pros: State-certified scales maintained by the State of Florida with transparent weighing and testing done in front of customers
No hidden refining fees explicitly stated, unlike many competitors
No minimum weight requirements for items purchased
No appointment necessary—walk-in service available during business hours
BBB membership and state of Florida licensing and insurance
Family-owned and operated with stated focus on honest transactions
Accepts items in any condition including broken gold and single earrings
cons: Claim to pay 'more' than competitors is unverifiable and largely dependent on live market prices and individual testing
Precious metals buying inherently involves significant profit margins for the buyer, meaning customers will not receive spot price value
Limited to solid precious metals only—does not buy gold-plated, gold-filled, or other alternatives, restricting what some customers can sell
No online pricing tool or instant quotes available; in-person visit required for valuation
Business hours do not include Sunday or evening service, limiting accessibility for some customers
best_for: Consumers looking to quickly liquidate unwanted gold, silver, or platinum jewelry for immediate cash
Estate executors or families disposing of inherited jewelry and precious metals
People with broken, damaged, or mismatched jewelry pieces they no longer wear
diagnosis: Best for consumers with unwanted solid gold, silver, or platinum jewelry who need quick cash and value transparent, in-person transactions. Main caveat: precious metals buyers profit on the spread between buying and selling prices to refiners, so customers should expect to receive significantly less than current spot market prices; comparison shopping with multiple buyers is advised before selling.
services: Gold jewelry buying (all conditions including broken gold)
Gold chains, necklaces, rings, wedding bands, earrings, pendants, bracelets, and bangles
Silver coins and silver tea sets
Precious metals testing and weighing on state-certified scales
Walk-in service with no appointment required
